ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spacecraft_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* Norad ID of the spacecraft */,
  "source" TEXT /* Callsign of the receiver or source of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of when the data was received */,
  "frame" TEXT /* Received binary data as a hexadecimal string */,
  "locator" TEXT /* Type of location for the receiver (e.g., 'longLat' for WGS84 coordinates) */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the received signal (e.g., in dB) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency at which the data was received (e.g., in MHz) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., telemetry, imagery, etc.) */,
  "encryption_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the data was encrypted */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Indicates the status of data processing (e.g., pending, processed, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecraft_data_norad_id FOREIGN KEY ("norad_id") REFERENCES norad_catalog ("norad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecraft_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES receivers ("callsign")
)

CREATE TABLE "norad_catalog" (
  "norad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "mission_details" TEXT /* Details about the spacecraft's mission */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the spacecraft was launched */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit (e.g., LEO, GEO, MEO) */,
  "orbit_altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the orbit (e.g., in kilometers) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("norad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receivers" (
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiver */,
  "callsign" TEXT /* Callsign of the receiver */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the receiver (e.g., 'longLat' for WGS84 coordinates) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the receiver */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware being used */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being used */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frame */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry the frame belongs to */,
  "hex_frame" TEXT /* Raw binary data frame in hexadecimal format */,
  "frame_length" INTEGER /* Length of the data frame (e.g., in bytes) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_frames_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spacecraft_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., mission control, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, process) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spacecraft_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the receiver the location is associated with */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate in WGS84 standard */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate in WGS84 standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location (e.g., in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES receivers ("receiver_id")
)
